User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the AgriGrow AI application. This entity stores core profile information, with authentication handled by an external system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

displayName.description: The user's preferred name for display purposes.

phone.description: The user's phone number, primarily used for OTP authentication.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for application interface and communications (e.g., 'en', 'hi').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account information was last updated.

FarmField.title: FarmField
FarmField.description: Represents a specific farm field managed by a user, including its physical characteristics and current crop information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FarmField entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this farm field. (Relationship: User 1:N FarmField)

name.description: A user-defined name for the farm field (e.g., 'North Acre Field', 'Plot 3').

locationDescription.description: A descriptive text for the field's location (e.g., 'Near the river', 'Behind the house').

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the farm field.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the farm field.

area.description: The total area of the farm field.

unitOfArea.description: The unit of measurement for the field's area (e.g., 'acres', 'hectares', 'sq_meters').

currentCropId.description: Reference to the Crop currently being cultivated in this field. (Relationship: Crop 1:N FarmField)

soilType.description: The primary soil type of the field (e.g., 'Loamy', 'Clay', 'Sandy').

lastSoilReportId.description: Reference to the most recent SoilReport for this field, for quick access. (Relationship: SoilReport 1:N FarmField)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the farm field record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the farm field record was last updated.

Crop.title: Crop
Crop.description: Defines characteristics of a specific crop type, used for cultivation planning and recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Crop entity.

name.description: The common name of the crop (e.g., 'Wheat', 'Maize', 'Rice').

description.description: A brief description of the crop.

optimalSoilPHMin.description: The minimum optimal soil pH level for this crop.

optimalSoilPHMax.description: The maximum optimal soil pH level for this crop.

plantingSeasonStart.description: The typical start month/period for planting this crop (e.g., 'March', 'Spring').

plantingSeasonEnd.description: The typical end month/period for planting this crop.

harvestSeasonStart.description: The typical start month/period for harvesting this crop.

harvestSeasonEnd.description: The typical end month/period for harvesting this crop.

YieldRecord.title: YieldRecord
YieldRecord.description: Records historical actual yield data for a specific crop harvested from a farm field.

id.description: Unique identifier for the YieldRecord entity.

farmFieldId.description: Reference to the FarmField where the yield was harvested. (Relationship: FarmField 1:N YieldRecord)

cropId.description: Reference to the Crop that was harvested. (Relationship: Crop 1:N YieldRecord)

harvestDate.description: The date when the crop was harvested.

actualYield.description: The actual quantity of the crop harvested.

unitOfYield.description: The unit of measurement for the actual yield (e.g., 'kg', 'tonnes', 'bushels').

notes.description: Any additional notes about the harvest or yield.

SoilReport.title: SoilReport
SoilReport.description: Stores detailed soil analysis data for a farm field, often extracted from lab reports via AI Vision.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SoilReport entity.

farmFieldId.description: Reference to the FarmField to which this soil report pertains. (Relationship: FarmField 1:N SoilReport)

reportDate.description: The date the soil report was generated or performed.

ph.description: The pH level of the soil.

nitrogenLevel.description: The nitrogen (N) level in the soil (e.g., in ppm).

phosphorusLevel.description: The phosphorus (P) level in the soil (e.g., in ppm).

potassiumLevel.description: The potassium (K) level in the soil (e.g., in ppm).

moistureLevel.description: The moisture content percentage in the soil.

organicMatterPercentage.description: The percentage of organic matter present in the soil.

scanPhotoUrl.description: URL to the scanned image of the physical soil report, if applicable.

source.description: Indicates how the soil report data was obtained (e.g., 'AI Vision Scan', 'Manual Entry').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the soil report record was created.

YieldForecast.title: YieldForecast
YieldForecast.description: Stores predictive yield estimates generated by AI models for a specific crop and field, including explainable insights.

id.description: Unique identifier for the YieldForecast entity.

farmFieldId.description: Reference to the FarmField for which the yield is forecasted. (Relationship: FarmField 1:N YieldForecast)

cropId.description: Reference to the Crop for which the yield is forecasted. (Relationship: Crop 1:N YieldForecast)

forecastDate.description: The timestamp when this yield forecast was generated.

predictedHarvestDate.description: The estimated date of harvest for which this forecast is applicable.

forecastedYield.description: The predicted quantity of crop yield.

unitOfYield.description: The unit of measurement for the forecasted yield (e.g., 'kg', 'tonnes').

confidenceScore.description: A score (0-1) indicating the confidence level of the AI model's prediction.

modelUsed.description: The name or version of the AI model used for generating the forecast (e.g., 'Gemini 1.5 Pro').

insightText.description: Explainable AI insights providing transparent logic for the prediction (e.g., 'Lower yield predicted due to reduced rainfall').

factorsConsidered.description: A list of key factors the AI considered in generating the forecast (e.g., 'rainfall', 'fertilizer', 'soil pH').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the yield forecast record was created.

Recommendation.title: Recommendation
Recommendation.description: Stores actionable advice generated by AI for improving farm management based on current and forecasted data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Recommendation entity.

farmFieldId.description: Reference to the FarmField for which the recommendation is given. (Relationship: FarmField 1:N Recommendation)

cropId.description: Reference to the Crop relevant to this recommendation. Optional if the recommendation is general. (Relationship: Crop 1:N Recommendation)

recommendationText.description: The full text of the actionable recommendation (e.g., 'Apply 50kg lime/acre to adjust soil pH').

recommendationType.description: The category of the recommendation (e.g., 'fertilizer', 'irrigation', 'pest control', 'planting').

generatedDate.description: The timestamp when this recommendation was generated.

status.description: The current status of the recommendation (e.g., 'pending', 'applied', 'dismissed', 'archived').

sourceForecastId.description: Reference to the YieldForecast that prompted this recommendation, if applicable. (Relationship: YieldForecast 1:N Recommendation)

WeatherData.title: WeatherData
WeatherData.description: Records real-time meteorological conditions for a specific farm field, used for dynamic alerts and insights.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WeatherData entity.

farmFieldId.description: Reference to the FarmField for which the weather data is recorded. (Relationship: FarmField 1:N WeatherData)

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the weather data was recorded.

humidityPercentage.description: The relative humidity as a percentage.

precipitationMillimeters.description: The amount of precipitation in millimeters over a period (e.g., last hour or day).

windSpeedMps.description: The wind speed in meters per second.

weatherConditions.description: A brief description of the weather conditions (e.g., 'sunny', 'cloudy', 'light rain').

alertType.description: Type of weather alert, if any (e.g., 'frost warning', 'irrigation needed', 'heat advisory').

alertDescription.description: Detailed description of the weather alert.

DiseaseDetectionReport.title: DiseaseDetectionReport
DiseaseDetectionReport.description: Stores reports generated by the AI Vision Suite for detecting diseases or pests from crop photos, including treatment plans.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DiseaseDetectionReport entity.

farmFieldId.description: Reference to the FarmField where the photo was taken and disease detected. (Relationship: FarmField 1:N DiseaseDetectionReport)

cropId.description: Reference to the Crop type that is affected by the detected disease/pest. (Relationship: Crop 1:N DiseaseDetectionReport)

detectionDate.description: The timestamp when the disease detection was performed.

photoUrl.description: URL to the image uploaded for disease detection.

detectedDiseases.description: A list of names of diseases or pests identified in the photo.

diseaseConfidenceScore.description: A score (0-1) indicating the AI's confidence in the disease detection.

treatmentPlan.description: A detailed 3-part treatment plan recommended for the detected diseases/pests.

status.description: The current status of the report (e.g., 'new', 'in progress', 'resolved', 'archived').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the disease detection report record was created.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Stores messages exchanged with the AI Farm Assistant (Agri-Bot), enabling chat history and context.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who initiated or received the message. (Relationship: User 1:N ChatMessage)

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was sent or received.

senderType.description: Indicates whether the sender was the 'user' or the 'bot'.

messageText.description: The content of the chat message.

language.description: The language in which the message was sent or responded (e.g., 'en', 'hi').

definition.description: Stores core user profile data. Access is strictly limited to the authenticated user matching the {userId} in the path.
Stores details for each farm field owned by a specific user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the farm field.

params.name: farmFieldId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific farm field.

definition.description: Global collection storing definitions and characteristics of various crop types. This data is generally publicly readable for reference by all users.

params.name: cropId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific crop type.

definition.description: Stores historical yield data for a specific farm field. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'farmFieldId' for authorization independence and direct ownership checks.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the parent farm field.

params.name: farmFieldId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent farm field.

params.name: yieldRecordId
params.description: The unique identifier for the yield record.

params.name: soilReportId
params.description: The unique identifier for the soil report.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated yield forecasts for a specific farm field. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'farmFieldId' for authorization independence and direct ownership checks.

params.name: farmFieldId

params.name: forecastId
params.description: The unique identifier for the yield forecast.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated actionable recommendations for a specific farm field. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'farmFieldId' for authorization independence and direct ownership checks.

params.name: farmFieldId

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore structure prioritizes strict user ownership and authorization independence, crucial for a secure and scalable AgriGrow AI application. All user-specific data is encapsulated within a `/users/{userId}` path, making security rules straightforward and highly performant. The core principle of **Authorization Independence** is achieved through systematic denormalization: for every subcollection nested under a user's `farmField` (e.g., `yieldRecords`, `soilReports`, `yieldForecasts`, `recommendations`, `weatherData`, `diseaseDetectionReports`), the `userId` and `farmFieldId` are explicitly included as fields within each document. This eliminates the need for expensive and complex `get()` operations in security rules to check parent document ownership, allowing atomic rule evaluation and simplifying debugging. For example, a rule for a `yieldRecord` can directly verify `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId` and `resource.data.farmFieldId == farmFieldId` (from the path), ensuring only the field owner can access their records.

**Querying for All Permitted Documents (QAPs)** is directly supported by this structure. Since `userId` is part of the path for all user-owned data, `list` operations can efficiently leverage Firestore's native security capabilities. For instance, to retrieve all `farmFields` for the authenticated user, a query to `/users/{request.auth.uid}/farmFields` will naturally return only authorized documents. Similarly, to fetch all `yieldRecords` for a particular `farmField`, the query to `/users/{request.auth.uid}/farmFields/{farmFieldId}/yieldRecords` is secure because the path itself restricts access to the authenticated user's data, and the denormalized `userId` and `farmFieldId` in the documents further reinforce this, allowing simple `allow read: if request.auth.uid == userId;` type rules. The global `crops` collection, containing reference data, stands as a top-level collection, accessible to all users for read operations, maintaining a homogeneous security posture for shared data. This design prevents `get()` calls in rules, simplifies rule logic to direct `request.auth.uid` checks, and naturally supports efficient, secure queries.
